title: paraprasophyllum anticum
intro: Paraprasophyllum anticum, also known as the "Hill Butterfly Orchid", is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paraprasophyllum anticum include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve boiling the roots and rhizomes in water to create a decoction, which can then be used topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
